notes: Default character-size gameplay profile. Generate one raw source frame at a time on a larger transparent/#ff00ff canvas; preserve empty padding and normalize later with shared scale.
Expanded action profile for large body motion, weapons, wings, tails, leaps, spells, flashes, and special effects. Preserve full-envelope whitespace; do not scale body/effects up to fill canvas.
Medium monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 2 times character size. Core body target is 70-75% of frame, hard max 80% before effects.
Medium monster expanded action profile. Keep core body at medium gameplay footprint; preserve full-envelope whitespace around attacks/effects.
Large monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 3 times character size. Core body target is 70-75% of frame, hard max 80% before effects.
Large monster expanded action profile. Keep core body at large gameplay footprint; preserve full-envelope whitespace around attacks/effects.
